Kruger Shalati Dining

Dining at Kruger Shalati is part of the stay, with meals shaped around game drives and the Sabie River setting.

★ 4.5 188 reviews
Image slot Restaurant Kruger Shalati Dining

About this restaurant

Dining at Kruger Shalati is part of the stay, with meals shaped around game drives and the Sabie River setting.

Signature dish

Bridge hotel meals, bush breakfasts, and South African lodge dinners

Practical information

If not staying at the property, verify visitor dining access before planning around it.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Kruger National Park.

A distinctive Kruger stay built around restored train carriages on the Selati Bridge over the Sabie River.
